proposal.focus_keyword: step by step claude copywriter setup and resources explained
proposal.working_title: Step by Step Claude Copywriter Setup and Resources Explained: 2026 Operator Playbook
proposal.one_line_angle: A repeatable setup that turns Claude from a one-shot prompt into a copy production stack you can hand to a junior writer, with the system prompt, folder layout, and three review checks we use at firstmovers.ai/labs.
outline_bullets: The system prompt that anchors Claude to your brand voice (not generic ChatGPT)
The four-folder Claude project layout: brand voice, examples, exclusions, drafts
Three QA checks every Claude draft must pass before it ships
